title: Global Dietary Quality Questionnaire (DQQ) Results — Saudi Arabia
abstract: Standardized Dietary Quality Questionnaire results providing diet quality indicators (e.g. Minimum Dietary Diversity for Women, food group consumption) disaggregated by income group, region, and demographic subgroup, for 2021-2024.

variables.name: Indicator
variables.label: Dietary Indicator
variables.description: Which diet quality indicator this row reports (e.g. MDD-W = Minimum Dietary Diversity for Women).

variables.name: Mean
variables.label: Indicator Mean Value
variables.description: Mean value of the indicator for the country/subgroup.

variables.name: n
variables.label: Sample Size
variables.description: Number of respondents underlying the estimate.

steward.name: Global Diet Quality Project (mirrored internally by KAUST)

provenance.originator: Global Diet Quality Project (Gallup World Poll partnership)
provenance.license: Open data per Global Diet Quality Project terms
provenance.citation: Global Diet Quality Project. Dietary Quality Questionnaire (DQQ) Results, 2021-2024.

known_issues: Dataset is a global compilation covering all countries — has not yet been filtered to the Saudi Arabia rows specifically for this catalog entry.
